pdf_content:
Major Data Format Changes 

TRMM V6 --> V7 

as of 10 Oct 2011 

(Minor format changes are not listed) 

ALG 

V6 --> V7 CHANGES 

Metadata 

Complete redesign.  Metadata elements are grouped; usually a group 
does not appear in all products.  (In V6 all elements were in all 
products.)  Number of scans written in SwathHeader group to allow 
multiswath products. 

L1, L2 

L1, L2 

LH 

1B01 

2A12 

2A21 

2A25 

2B31 

3A12 

3B31 

3B42 

3B43 

Scan Status changes. 

Geolocation changed to Latitude, Longitude 

New products: 2 TRAIN, 3 SLH, 3 CSH. 

Many variables changed to floats (from scaled integers in V6). 

Complete redesign.  Added surface precipitation.  New quality flags.  
Hydrometeor profiles have 28 layers (14 in V6).  Profiles are not 
written per pixel.  Instead indexes are written per pixel and used to 
retrieve a profile from an array. 

Added alternate PIA.  Reliability Flag simpler.  Many variables changed 
to floats (from scaled integers in V6). 

Many variables changed to floats (from scaled integers in V6). 

Added surface precipitation, snow profile, graupel profile. 

Added surface precipitation. 

Redesign.  Profiles have 28 layers (14 in V6).  Grid 0.5º (5º  in V6).  
Added surface precipitation. 

Added gaugeRelativeWeighting 

Added source information, HQ precipitation, IR precipitation
